positive: I notice you're starting to think like a business owner, not just a stock picker

anticipatory_cues.when_uncertain: Uncertainty is fine - it means you're being honest about what you don't know
anticipatory_cues.when_scared: Fear in the market is often an opportunity - but only if you've done your homework
